allow: Bash(gh pr view https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/18637 --json title,body,files,additions,deletions,commits 2>/dev/null || echo "gh not authenticated or unavailable")
Bash(gh pr view https://github.com/kvcache-ai/Mooncake/pull/1214 2>/dev/null || echo "gh not authenticated, will use WebFetch")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/kvcache-ai/Mooncake/pulls/1214/commits" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c['sha'][:8], c['commit']['message'].split\('\\n'\)[0]\) for c in data]")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/kvcache-ai/Mooncake/issues/1214/comments" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\('---\\nUser:', c['user']['login'], '\\nDate:', c['created_at'], '\\n', c['body'][:500]\) for c in data]")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/kvcache-ai/Mooncake/pulls/1214/reviews" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
data=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for r in data:
    print\('---'\)
    print\('User:', r['user']['login']\)
    print\('State:', r['state']\)
    print\('Date:', r['submitted_at']\)
    print\('Body:', r['body'][:1000] if r['body'] else '\(no body\)'\)
    print\(\)
")
